Features Install Community Pricing
Get Started
Open source · Free to start

The AI agent that
works while you sleep

TrenchLaw runs complex, multi-step tasks autonomously - no babysitting, no prompt loops. Set a goal and walk away.

Star on GitHub See how to install →
No credit card MIT licensed Works in under 5 min
trenchlaw - bash
$npx trenchlaw init
⬇ Fetching TrenchLaw...
✔ Config created → .trenchlaw.json
$npx trenchlaw start --task "monitor inbox and summarize daily"
✔ Agent deployed · running task loop
✔ First summary ready in /output/summary-2026-03-23.md
$

Features

Everything you need,
nothing you don't

⚡

Fully autonomous

TrenchLaw plans, executes, and adapts mid-task without waiting for your input. Real autonomy, not just autocomplete.

🔗

Deep integrations

Connects to APIs, databases, browsers, and shells out of the box. If it has an interface, TrenchLaw can use it.

🧩

Multi-agent support

Spawn specialized sub-agents in parallel. Coordinate complex workflows without writing orchestration code.

🔒

Private by default

Runs locally or in your own cloud. Your tasks, your data - never stored on our servers.

📋

Structured outputs

Results come back as clean JSON, Markdown, or files - ready to pipe into your next step.

🛠

Extensible

Write custom tools in any language. TrenchLaw picks them up automatically at runtime.

Installation

Up in 4 steps

Requires Node.js 18+. No Docker, no setup scripts.

1

Clone the repo

Pull TrenchLaw from GitHub to your machine.

2

Install packages

Run npm install to pull in dependencies.

3

Configure your env

Copy .env.example, add your API keys.

4

Launch the agent

Run npm start and TrenchLaw is live.

$ git clone https://github.com/sipeed/trenchlaw
$ cd trenchlaw && npm install
$ cp .env.example .env
$ npm run start

Or skip all of this: npx trenchlaw init handles everything automatically.

1

Open your app store

Go to the App Store on iPhone or the Google Play Store on Android.

2

Search for TrenchLaw

Type "TrenchLaw" in the search bar and tap the official app.

3

Tap Install

Hit Get on iOS or Install on Android. It's free to download.

4

Open & start

Launch TrenchLaw, sign in or create an account, and your agent is ready to go.

Coming soon

Mobile apps are on the way

We are preparing the first TrenchLaw mobile release for iPhone and Android. Join the waitlist and we will notify you when downloads go live.

iPhone waitlist Android waitlist

We will email early access links as soon as the mobile apps are ready.

Community

Join the builders

TrenchLaw is open source. Come contribute, ask questions, or just follow along.

GitHub

Browse the source, open issues, and submit PRs. All development happens in the open. Stars help us grow.

View repository

X / Twitter

Follow for release announcements, tips, and what people are building with TrenchLaw in the wild.

Follow @SipeedIO

Pricing

Simple, honest pricing

Start free, upgrade when you need more. No hidden fees, no usage surprises.

Free

$0/mo

PC - Free Phone - Not available

Everything you need to get started and stay productive.

  • 1 agent running at a time
  • 100 task runs / month
  • Core tool integrations
  • Local execution
  • Community support
  • Multi-agent coordination
  • Priority support
Get started free
Coming soon

Pro

$5/mo

PC - $5 / mo Phone - $5 / mo

For developers who want to run serious, production-grade agents.

  • 10 agents in parallel
  • Unlimited task runs
  • All integrations
  • Cloud + local execution
  • Multi-agent coordination
  • Structured JSON outputs
  • Email support
Start Pro free for 14 days
